task:
A pre-seeded Zotero library is at /home/user/Zotero/zotero.sqlite, and a PDF is provided at /home/user/Documents/deep_learning.pdf.

On the existing 'Deep Learning' item:
1. Attach /home/user/Documents/deep_learning.pdf as a stored child attachment.
2. Add a child note whose body contains exactly the phrases `Chapter 1: Introduction` and `key definitions`.

After saving, 'Deep Learning' must have at least one child PDF attachment and at least one child note containing both phrases. Leave Zotero running.

verification.description: Deep Learning has a child note
